'os';\n7: import * as path from 'path';\n8: import * as vscode from 'vscode';\n9: import { ServiceConfigurationProvider, SyntaxServerConfiguration, TsServerLogLevel, TypeScriptServiceConfiguration, areServiceConfigurationsEqual } from './configuration/configuration';\n10: import * as fileSchemes from './configuration/fileSchemes';\n11: import { Schemes } from './configuration/schemes';\n12: import { IExperimentationTelemetryReporter } from './experimentTelemetryReporter';\n13: import { DiagnosticKind, DiagnosticsManager } from './languageFeatures/diagnostics';\n14: import { Logger } from './logging/logger';\n15: import { TelemetryProperties, TelemetryReporter, VSCodeTelemetryReporter } from './logging/telemetry';\n16: import Tracer from './logging/tracer';\n17: import { ProjectType, inferredProjectCompilerOptions } from './tsconfig';\n18: import { API } from './tsServer/api';\n19: import BufferSyncSupport from './tsServer/bufferSyncSupport';\n20: import { OngoingRequestCancellerFactory } from './tsServer/cancellation';\n21: import { ILogDirectoryProvider } from './tsServer/logDirectoryProvider';\n22: import { NodeVersionManager } from './tsServer/nodeManager';\n23: import { TypeScriptPluginPathsProvider } from './tsServer/pluginPathsProvider';\n24: import { PluginManager } from './tsServer/plugins';\n25: import * as Proto from './tsServer/protocol/protocol';\n26: import { EventName } from './tsServer/protocol/protocol.const';\n27: import { ITypeScriptServer, TsServerLog, TsServerProcessFactory, TypeScriptServerExitEvent } from './tsServer/server';\n28: import { TypeScriptServerError } from './tsServer/serverError';\n29: import { TypeScriptServerSpawner } from './tsServer/spawner';\n30: import { TypeScriptVersionManager } from './tsServer/versionManager';\n31: import { ITypeScriptVersionProvider, TypeScriptVersion } from './tsServer/versionProvider';\n32: import { ClientCapabilities, ClientCapability, ExecConfig, ITypeScriptServiceClient, ServerResponse, TypeScriptRequests } from './typescriptService';\n33: import { Disposable, DisposableStore, disposeAll } from './utils/dispose';\n34: import { hash } from './utils/hash';\n35: import { isWeb, isWebAndHasSharedArrayBuffers } from './utils/platform';\n36: \n37: \n38: export interface TsDiagnostics {\n39: \treadonly kind: DiagnosticKind;\n40: \treadonly resource: vscode.Uri;\n41: \treadonly diagnostics: Proto.Diagnostic[];\n42: \treadonly spans?: Proto.TextSpan[];\n43: }\n44: \n45: interface ToCancelOnResourceChanged {\n46: \treadonly resource: vscode.Uri;\n47: \tcancel(): void;\n48: }\n49: \n50: namespace ServerState {\n51: \texport const enum Type {\n52: \t\tNone,\n53: \t\tRunning,\n54: \t\tErrored\n55: \t}\n56: \n57: \texport const None = { type: Type.None } as const;\n58: \n59: \texport class Running {\n60: \t\treadonly type = Type.Running;\n61: \n62: \t\tconstructor(\n63: \t\t\tpublic readonly server: ITypeScriptServer,\n64: \n65: \t\t\t/**\n66: \t\t\t * API version obtained from the version picker after checking the corresponding path exists.\n67: \t\t\t */\n68: \t\t\tpublic readonly apiVersion: API,\n69: \n70: \t\t\t/**\n71: \t\t\t * Version reported by currently-running tsserver.\n72: \t\t\t */\n73: \t\t\tpublic tsserverVersion: string | undefined,\n74: \t\t\tpublic languageServiceEnabled: boolean,\n75: \t\t) { }\n76: \n77: \t\tpublic readonly toCancelOnResourceChange = new Set<ToCancelOnResourceChanged>();\n78: \n79: \t\tupdateTsserverVersion(tsserverVersion: string) {\n80: \t\t\tthis.tsserverVersion = tsserverVersion;\n81: \t\t}\n82: \n83: \t\tupdateLanguageServiceEnabled(enabled: boolean) {\n84: \t\t\tthis.languageServiceEnabled = enabled;\n85: \t\t}\n86: \t}\n87: \n88: \texport class Errored {\n89: \t\treadonly type = Type.Errored;\n90: \t\tconstructor(\n91: \t\t\tpublic readonly error: Error,\n92: \t\t\tpublic readonly tsServerLog: TsServerLog | undefined,\n93: \t\t) { }\n94: \t}\n95: \n96: \texport type State = typeof None | Running | Errored;\n97: }\n98: \n99: export const emptyAuthority = 'ts-nul-authority';\n100: \n101: export const inMemoryResourcePrefix = '^';\n102: \n103: interface WatchEvent {\n104: \tupdated?: Set<string>;\n105: \tcreated?: Set<string>;\n106: \tdeleted?: Set<string>;\n107: }\n108: \n109: export default class TypeScriptServiceClient extends Disposable implements ITypeScriptServiceClient {\n110: \n111: \n112: \tprivate readonly _onReady?: { promise: Promise<void>; resolve: () => void; reject: () => void };\n113: \tprivate _configuration: TypeScriptServiceConfiguration;\n114: \tprivate readonly pluginPathsProvider: TypeScriptPluginPathsProvider;\n115: \tprivate readonly _versionManager: TypeScriptVersionManager;\n116: \tprivate readonly _nodeVersionManager: NodeVersionManager;\n117: \n118: \tprivate readonly logger: Logger;\n119: \tprivate readonly tracer: Tracer;\n120: \n121: \tprivate readonly typescriptServerSpawner: TypeScriptServerSpawner;\n122: \tprivate serverState: ServerState.State = ServerState.None;\n123: \tprivate lastStart: number;\n124: \tprivate numberRestarts: number;\n125: \tprivate _isPromptingAfterCrash = false;\n126: \tprivate isRestarting: boolean = false;\n127: \tprivate hasServerFatallyCrashedTooManyTimes = false;\n128: \tprivate readonly loadingIndicator: ServerInitializingIndicator;\n129: \n130: \tpublic readonly telemetryReporter: TelemetryReporter;\n131: \tpublic readonly bufferSyncSupport: BufferSyncSupport;\n132: \tpublic readonly diagnosticsManager: DiagnosticsManager;\n133: \tpublic readonly pluginManager: PluginManager;\n134: \n135: \tprivate readonly logDirectoryProvider: ILogDirectoryProvider;\n136: \tprivate readonly cancellerFactory: OngoingRequestCancellerFactory;\n137: \tprivate readonly versionProvider: ITypeScriptVersionProvider;\n138: \tprivate readonly processFactory: TsServerProcessFactory;\n139: \n140: \tprivate readonly watches = new Map<number, Disposable>();\n141: \tprivate readonly watchEvents = new Map<number, WatchEvent>();\n142: \tprivate watchChangeTimeout: NodeJS.Timeout | undefined;\n143: \n144: \tconstructor(\n145: \t\tprivate readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext,\n146: \t\tonCaseInsensitiveFileSystem: boolean,\n147: \t\tservices: {\n148: \t\t\tpluginManager: PluginManager;\n149: \t\t\tlogDirectoryProvider: ILogDirectoryProvider;\n150: \t\t\tcancellerFactory: OngoingRequestCancellerFactory;\n151: \t\t\tversionProvider: ITypeScriptVersionProvider;\n152: \t\t\tprocessFactory: TsServerProcessFactory;\n153: \t\t\tserviceConfigurationProvider: ServiceConfigurationProvider;\n154: \t\t\texperimentTelemetryReporter: IExperimentationTelemetryReporter | undefined;\n155: \t\t\tlogger: Logger;\n156: \t\t},\n157: \t\tallModeIds: readonly string[]\n158: \t) {\n159: \t\tsuper();\n160: \n161: \t\tthis.loadingIndicator = this._register(new ServerInitializingIndicator(this));\n162: \n163: \t\tthis.logger = services.logger;\n164: \t\tthis.tracer = new Tracer(this.logger);\n165: \n166: \t\tthis.pluginManager = services.pluginManager;\n167: \t\tthis.logDirectoryProvider = services.logDirectoryProvider;\n168: \t\tthis.cancellerFactory = services.cancellerFactory;\n169: \t\tthis.versionProvider = services.versionProvider;\n170: \t\tthis.processFactory = services.processFactory;\n171: \n172: \t\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\n173: \n174: \t\tlet resolve: () => void;\n175: \t\tlet reject: () => void;\n176: \t\tconst p = new Promise<void>((res, rej) => {\n177: \t\t\tresolve = res;\n178: \t\t\treject = rej;\n179: \t\t});\n180: \t\tthis._onReady = { promise: p, resolve: resolve!, reject: reject! };\n181: \n182: \t\tthis.numberRestarts = 0;\n183: \n184: \t\tthis._configuration = services.serviceConfigurationProvider.loadFromWorkspace();\n185: \t\tthis.versionProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\n186: \n187: \t\tthis.pluginPathsProvider = new TypeScriptPluginPathsProvider(this._configuration);\n188: \t\tthis._versionManager = this._register(new TypeScriptVersionManager(this._configuration, this.versionProvider, context.workspaceState));\n189: \t\tthis._register(this._versionManager.onDidPickNewVersion(() => {\n190: \t\t\tthis.restartTsServer();\n191: \t\t}));\n192: \n193: \t\tthis._nodeVersionManager = this._register(new NodeVersionManager(this._configuration, context.workspaceState));\n194: \t\tthis._register(this._nodeVersionManager.onDidPickNewVersion(() => {\n195: \t\t\tthis.restartTsServer();\n196: \t\t}));\n197: \n198: \t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport = new BufferSyncSupport(this, allModeIds, onCaseInsensitiveFileSystem);\n199: \t\tthis.onReady(() => { this.bufferSyncSupport.listen(); });\n200: \n201: \t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.onDelete(resource => {\n202: \t\t\tthis.cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource);\n203: \t\t\tthis.diagnosticsManager.deleteAllDiagnosticsInFile(resource);\n204: \t\t}, null, this._disposables);\n205: \n206: \t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.onWillChange(resource => {\n207: \t\t\tthis.cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource);\n208: \t\t});\n209: \n210: \t\tvscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(() => {\n211: \t\t\tconst oldConfiguration = this._configuration;\n212: \t\t\tthis._configuration = services.serviceConfigurationProvider.loadFromWorkspace();\n213: \n214: \t\t\tthis.versionProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\n215: \t\t\tthis._versionManager.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\n216: \t\t\tthis.pluginPathsProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\n217: \t\t\tthis._nodeVersionManager.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\n218: \n219: \t\t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n220: \t\t\t\tif (!this._configuration.implicitProjectConfiguration.isEqualTo(oldConfiguration.implicitProjectConfiguration)) {\n221: \t\t\t\t\tthis.setCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(this._configuration);\n222: \t\t\t\t}\n223: \n224: \t\t\t\tif (!areServiceConfigurationsEqual(this._configuration, oldConfiguration)) {\n225: \t\t\t\t\tthis.restartTsServer();\n226: \t\t\t\t}\n227: \t\t\t}\n228: \t\t}, this, this._disposables);\n229: \n230: \t\tthis.telemetryReporter = new VSCodeTelemetryReporter(services.experimentTelemetryReporter, () => {\n231: \t\t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n232: \t\t\t\tif (this.serverState.tsserverVersion) {\n233: \t\t\t\t\treturn this.serverState.tsserverVersion;\n234: \t\t\t\t}\n235: \t\t\t}\n236: \t\t\treturn this.apiVersion.fullVersionString;\n237: \t\t});\n238: \n239: \t\tthis.diagnosticsManager = new DiagnosticsManager('typescript', this._configuration, this.telemetryReporter, onCaseInsensitiveFileSystem);\n240: \t\tthis.typescriptServerSpawner = new TypeScriptServerSpawner(this.versionProvider, this._versionManager, this._nodeVersionManager, this.logDirectoryProvider, this.pluginPathsProvider, this.logger, this.telemetryReporter, this.tracer, this.processFactory);\n241: \n242: \t\tthis._register(this.pluginManager.onDidUpdateConfig(update => {\n243: \t\t\tthis.configurePlugin(update.pluginId, update.config);\n244: \t\t}));\n245: \n246: \t\tthis._register(this.pluginManager.onDidChangePlugins(() => {\n247: \t\t\tthis.restartTsServer();\n248: \t\t}));\n249: \t}\n250: \n251: \tpublic get capabilities() {\n252: \t\tif (this._configuration.useSyntaxServer === SyntaxServerConfiguration.Always) {\n253: \t\t\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\n254: \t\t\t\tClientCapability.Syntax,\n255: \t\t\t\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax);\n256: \t\t}\n257: \n258: \t\tif (isWeb()) {\n259: \t\t\tif (this.isProjectWideIntellisenseOnWebEnabled()) {\n260: \t\t\t\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\n261: \t\t\t\t\tClientCapability.Syntax,\n262: \t\t\t\t\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax,\n263: \t\t\t\t\tClientCapability.Semantic);\n264: \t\t\t} else {\n265: \t\t\t\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\n266: \t\t\t\t\tClientCapability.Syntax,\n267: \t\t\t\t\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax);\n268: \t\t\t}\n269: \t\t}\n270: \n271: \t\tif (this.apiVersion.gte(API.v400)) {\n272: \t\t\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\n273: \t\t\t\tClientCapability.Syntax,\n274: \t\t\t\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax,\n275: \t\t\t\tClientCapability.Semantic);\n276: \t\t}\n277: \n278: \t\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\n279: \t\t\tClientCapability.Syntax,\n280: \t\t\tClientCapability.Semantic);\n281: \t}\n282: \n283: \tprivate readonly _onDidChangeCapabilities = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<void>());\n284: \treadonly onDidChangeCapabilities = this._onDidChangeCapabilities.event;\n285: \n286: \tprivate isProjectWideIntellisenseOnWebEnabled(): boolean {\n287: \t\treturn isWebAndHasSharedArrayBuffers() && this._configuration.webProjectWideIntellisenseEnabled;\n288: \t}\n289: \n290: \tprivate cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource: vscode.Uri): void {\n291: \t\tif (this.serverState.type !== ServerState.Type.Running) {\n292: \t\t\treturn;\n293: \t\t}\n294: \n295: \t\tfor (const request of this.serverState.toCancelOnResourceChange) {\n296: \t\t\tif (request.resource.toString() === resource.toString()) {\n297: \t\t\t\trequest.cancel();\n298: \t\t\t}\n299: \t\t}\n300: \t}\n301: \n302: \tpublic get configuration() {\n303: \t\treturn this._configuration;\n304: \t}\n305: \n306: \tpublic override dispose() {\n307: \t\tsuper.dispose();\n308: \n309: \t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.dispose();\n310: \n311: \t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n312: \t\t\tthis.serverState.server.kill();\n313: \t\t}\n314: \n315: \t\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\n316: \n317: \t\tthis.resetWatchers();\n318: \t}\n319: \n320: \tpublic restartTsServer(fromUserAction = false): void {\n321: \t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n322: \t\t\tthis.info('Killing TS Server');\n323: \t\t\tthis.isRestarting = true;\n324: \t\t\tthis.serverState.server.kill();\n325: \t\t}\n326: \n327: \t\tif (fromUserAction) {\n328: \t\t\t// Reset crash trackers\n329: \t\t\tthis.hasServerFatallyCrashedTooManyTimes = false;\n330: \t\t\tthis.numberRestarts = 0;\n331: \t\t\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\n332: \t\t}\n333: \n334: \t\tthis.serverState = this.startService(true);\n335: \t}\n336: \n337: \tprivate readonly _onTsServerStarted = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<{ version: TypeScriptVersion; usedApiVersion: API }>());\n338: \tpublic readonly onTsServerStarted = this._onTsServerStarted.event;\n339: \n340: \tprivate readonly _onDiagnosticsReceived = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<TsDiagnostics>());\n341: \tpublic readonly onDiagnosticsReceived = this._onDiagnosticsReceived.event;\n342: \n343: \tprivate readonly _onConfigDiagnosticsReceived = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.ConfigFileDiagnosticEvent>());\n344: \tpublic readonly onConfigDiagnosticsReceived = this._onConfigDiagnosticsReceived.event;\n345: \n346: \tprivate readonly _onResendModelsRequested = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<void>());\n347: \tpublic readonly onResendModelsRequested = this._onResendModelsRequested.event;\n348: \n349: \tprivate readonly _onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.ProjectLanguageServiceStateEventBody>());\n350: \tpublic readonly onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged = this._onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged.event;\n351: \n352: \tprivate readonly _onDidBeginInstallTypings = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.BeginInstallTypesEventBody>());\n353: \tpublic readonly onDidBeginInstallTypings = this._onDidBeginInstallTypings.event;\n354: \n355: \tprivate readonly _onDidEndInstallTypings = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.EndInstallTypesEventBody>());\n356: \tpublic readonly onDidEndInstallTypings = this._onDidEndInstallTypings.event;\n357: \n358: \tprivate readonly _onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.TypesInstallerInitializationFailedEventBody>());\n359: \tpublic readonly onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed = this._onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed.event;\n360: \n361: \tprivate readonly _onSurveyReady = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.SurveyReadyEventBody>());\n362: \tpublic readonly onSurveyReady = this._onSurveyReady.event;\n363: \n364: \tpublic get apiVersion(): API {\n365: \t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n366: \t\t\treturn this.serverState.apiVersion;\n367: \t\t}\n368: \t\treturn API.defaultVersion;\n369: \t}\n370: \n371: \tpublic onReady(f: () => void): Promise<void> {\n372: \t\treturn this._onReady!.promise.then(f);\n373: \t}\n374: \n375: \tprivate info(message: string, ...data: any[]): void {\n376: \t\tthis.logger.info(message, ...data);\n377: \t}\n378: \n379: \tprivate error(message: string, ...data: any[]): void {\n380: \t\tthis.logger.error(message, ...data);\n381: \t}\n382: \n383: \tprivate logTelemetry(eventName: string, properties?: TelemetryProperties) {\n384: \t\tthis.telemetryReporter.logTelemetry(eventName, properties);\n385: \t}\n386: \n387: \tpublic ensureServiceStarted() {\n388: \t\tif (this.serverState.type !== ServerState.Type.Running) {\n389: \t\t\tthis.startService();\n390: \t\t}\n391: \t}\n392: \n393: \tprivate token: number = 0;\n394: \tprivate startService(resendModels: boolean = false): ServerState.State {\n395: \t\tthis.info(`Starting TS Server`);\n396: \n397: \t\tif (this.isDisposed) {\n398: \t\t\tthis.info(`Not starting server: disposed`);\n399: \t\t\treturn ServerState.None;\n400: \t\t}\n401: \n402: \t\tif (this.hasServerFatallyCrashedTooManyTimes) {\n403: \t\t\tthis.info(`Not starting server: too many crashes`);\n404: \t\t\treturn ServerState.None;\n405: \t\t}\n406: \n407: \t\tlet version = this._versionManager.currentVersion;\n408: \t\tif (!version.isValid) {\n409: \t\t\tvscode.window.showWarningMessage(vscode.l10n.t(\"The path {0} doesn't point to a valid tsserver install. Falling back to bundled TypeScript version.\", version.path));\n410: \n411: \t\t\tthis._versionManager.reset();\n412: \t\t\tversion = this._versionManager.currentVersion;\n413: \t\t}\n414: \n415: \t\tthis.info(`Using tsserver from: ${version.path}`);\n416: \t\tconst nodePath = this._nodeVersionManager.currentVersion;\n417: \t\tif (nodePath) {\n418: \t\t\tthis.info(`Using Node installation from ${nodePath} to run TS Server`);\n419: \t\t}\n420: \n421: \t\tthis.resetWatchers();\n422: \n423: \t\tconst apiVersion = version.apiVersion || API.defaultVersion;\n424: \t\tconst mytoken = ++this.token;\n425: \t\tconst handle = this.typescriptServerSpawner.spawn(version, this.capabilities, this.configuration, this.pluginManager, this.cancellerFactory, {\n426: \t\t\tonFatalError: (command, err) => this.fatalError(command, err),\n427: \t\t});\n428: \t\tthis.serverState = new ServerState.Running(handle, apiVersion, undefined, true);\n429: \t\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\n430: \n431: \n432: \t\t/* __GDPR__FRAGMENT__\n433: \t\t\t\"TypeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties\" : {\n434: \t\t\t\t\"hasGlobalPlugins\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" },\n435: \t\t\t\t\"globalPluginNameHashes\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" }\n436: \t\t\t}\n437: \t\t*/\n438: \t\tconst typeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties = {\n439: \t\t\thasGlobalPlugins: this.pluginManager.plugins.length > 0,\n440: \t\t\tglobalPluginNameHashes: JSON.stringify(this.pluginManager.plugins.map(plugin => hash(plugin.name))),\n441: \t\t};\n442: \n443: \t\t/* __GDPR__\n444: \t\t\t\"tsserver.spawned\" : {\n445: \t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n446: \t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n447: \t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\",\n448: \t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties}\"\n449: \t\t\t\t],\n450: \t\t\t\t\"localTypeScriptVersion\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" },\n451: \t\t\t\t\"typeScriptVersionSource\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" }\n452: \t\t\t}\n453: \t\t*/\n454: \t\tthis.logTelemetry('tsserver.spawned', {\n455: \t\t\t...typeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties,\n456: \t\t\tlocalTypeScriptVersion: this.versionProvider.localVersion ? this.versionProvider.localVersion.displayName : '',\n457: \t\t\ttypeScriptVersionSource: version.source,\n458: \t\t});\n459: \n460: \t\thandle.onError((err: Error) => {\n461: \t\t\tif (this.token !== mytoken) {\n462: \t\t\t\t// this is coming from an old process\n463: \t\t\t\treturn;\n464: \t\t\t}\n465: \n466: \t\t\tif (err) {\n467: \t\t\t\tvscode.window.showErrorMessage(vscode.l10n.t(\"TypeScript language server exited with error. Error message is: {0}\", err.message || err.name));\n468: \t\t\t}\n469: \n470: \t\t\tthis.serverState = new ServerState.Errored(err, handle.tsServerLog);\n471: \t\t\tthis.error('TSServer errored with error.', err);\n472: \t\t\tif (handle.tsServerLog?.type === 'file') {\n473: \t\t\t\tthis.error(`TSServer log file: ${handle.tsServerLog.uri.fsPath}`);\n474: \t\t\t}\n475: \n476: \t\t\t/* __GDPR__\n477: \t\t\t\t\"tsserver.error\" : {\n478: \t\t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n479: \t\t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n480: \t\t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\",\n481: \t\t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties}\"\n482: \t\t\t\t\t]\n483: \t\t\t\t}\n484: \t\t\t*/\n485: \t\t\tthis.logTelemetry('tsserver.error', {\n486: \t\t\t\t...typeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties\n487: \t\t\t});\n488: \t\t\tthis.serviceExited(false, apiVersion);\n489: \t\t});\n490: \n491: \t\thandle.onExit((data: TypeScriptServerExitEvent) => {\n492: \t\t\tconst { code, signal } = data;\n493: \t\t\tthis.error(`TSServer exited. Code: ${code}. Signal: ${signal}`);\n494: \n495: \t\t\t// In practice, the exit code is an integer with no ties to any identity,\n496: \t\t\t// so it can be classified as SystemMetaData, rather than CallstackOrException.\n497: \t\t\t/* __GDPR__\n498: \t\t\t\t\"tsserver.exitWithCode\" : {\n499: \t\t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n500: \t\t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n501: \t\t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\",\n502: \t\t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties}\"\n503: \t\t\t\t\t],\n504: \t\t\t\t\t\"code\" : { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"PerformanceAndHealth\" },\n505: \t\t\t\t\t\"signal\" : { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"PerformanceAndHealth\" }\n506: \t\t\t\t}\n507: \t\t\t*/\n508: \t\t\tthis.logTelemetry('tsserver.exitWithCode', {\n509: \t\t\t\t...typeScriptServerEnvCommonProperties,\n510: \t\t\t\tcode: code ?? undefined,\n511: \t\t\t\tsignal: signal ?? undefined,\n512: \t\t\t});\n513: \n514: \t\t\tif (this.token !== mytoken) {\n515: \t\t\t\t// this is coming from an old process\n516: \t\t\t\treturn;\n517: \t\t\t}\n518: \n519: \t\t\tif (handle.tsServerLog?.type === 'file') {\n520: \t\t\t\tthis.info(`TSServer log file: ${handle.tsServerLog.uri.fsPath}`);\n521: \t\t\t}\n522: \t\t\tthis.serviceExited(!this.isRestarting, apiVersion);\n523: \t\t\tthis.isRestarting = false;\n524: \t\t});\n525: \n526: \t\thandle.onEvent(event => this.dispatchEvent(event));\n527: \n528: \t\tthis.serviceStarted(resendModels);\n529: \n530: \t\tthis._onReady!.resolve();\n531: \t\tthis._onTsServerStarted.fire({ version: version, usedApiVersion: apiVersion });\n532: \t\tthis._onDidChangeCapabilities.fire();\n533: \t\treturn this.serverState;\n534: \t}\n535: \n536: \tprivate resetWatchers() {\n537: \t\tclearTimeout(this.watchChangeTimeout);\n538: \t\tdisposeAll(Array.from(this.watches.values()));\n539: \t}\n540: \n541: \tpublic async showVersionPicker(): Promise<void> {\n542: \t\tthis._versionManager.promptUserForVersion();\n543: \t}\n544: \n545: \tpublic async openTsServerLogFile(): Promise<boolean> {\n546: \t\tif (this._configuration.tsServerLogLevel === TsServerLogLevel.Off) {\n547: \t\t\tvscode.window.showErrorMessage<vscode.MessageItem>(\n548: \t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"TS Server logging is off. Please set 'typescript.tsserver.log' and restart the TS server to enable logging\"),\n549: \t\t\t\t{\n550: \t\t\t\t\ttitle: vscode.l10n.t(\"Enable logging and restart TS server\"),\n551: \t\t\t\t})\n552: \t\t\t\t.then(selection => {\n553: \t\t\t\t\tif (selection) {\n554: \t\t\t\t\t\treturn vscode.workspace.getConfiguration().update('typescript.tsserver.log', 'verbose', true).then(() => {\n555: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.restartTsServer();\n556: \t\t\t\t\t\t});\n557: \t\t\t\t\t}\n558: \t\t\t\t\treturn undefined;\n559: \t\t\t\t});\n560: \t\t\treturn false;\n561: \t\t}\n562: \n563: \t\tif (this.serverState.type !== ServerState.Type.Running || !this.serverState.server.tsServerLog) {\n564: \t\t\tvscode.window.showWarningMessage(vscode.l10n.t(\"TS Server has not started logging.\"));\n565: \t\t\treturn false;\n566: \t\t}\n567: \n568: \t\tswitch (this.serverState.server.tsServerLog.type) {\n569: \t\t\tcase 'output': {\n570: \t\t\t\tthis.serverState.server.tsServerLog.output.show();\n571: \t\t\t\treturn true;\n572: \t\t\t}\n573: \t\t\tcase 'file': {\n574: \t\t\t\ttry {\n575: \t\t\t\t\tconst doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(this.serverState.server.tsServerLog.uri);\n576: \t\t\t\t\tawait vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc);\n577: \t\t\t\t\treturn true;\n578: \t\t\t\t} catch {\n579: \t\t\t\t\t// noop\n580: \t\t\t\t}\n581: \n582: \t\t\t\ttry {\n583: \t\t\t\t\tawait vscode.commands.executeCommand('revealFileInOS', this.serverState.server.tsServerLog.uri);\n584: \t\t\t\t\treturn true;\n585: \t\t\t\t} catch {\n586: \t\t\t\t\tvscode.window.showWarningMessage(vscode.l10n.t(\"Could not open TS Server log file\"));\n587: \t\t\t\t\treturn false;\n588: \t\t\t\t}\n589: \t\t\t}\n590: \t\t}\n591: \t}\n592: \n593: \tprivate serviceStarted(resendModels: boolean): void {\n594: \t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.reset();\n595: \n596: \t\tconst watchOptions = this.apiVersion.gte(API.v380)\n597: \t\t\t? this.configuration.watchOptions\n598: \t\t\t: undefined;\n599: \n600: \t\tconst configureOptions: Proto.ConfigureRequestArguments = {\n601: \t\t\thostInfo: 'vscode',\n602: \t\t\tpreferences: {\n603: \t\t\t\tprovidePrefixAndSuffixTextForRename: true,\n604: \t\t\t\tallowRenameOfImportPath: true,\n605: \t\t\t\tincludePackageJsonAutoImports: this._configuration.includePackageJsonAutoImports,\n606: \t\t\t\texcludeLibrarySymbolsInNavTo: this._configuration.workspaceSymbolsExcludeLibrarySymbols,\n607: \t\t\t},\n608: \t\t\twatchOptions\n609: \t\t};\n610: \t\tthis.executeWithoutWaitingForResponse('configure', configureOptions);\n611: \t\tthis.setCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(this._configuration);\n612: \t\tif (resendModels) {\n613: \t\t\tthis._onResendModelsRequested.fire();\n614: \t\t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.reinitialize();\n615: \t\t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.requestAllDiagnostics();\n616: \t\t}\n617: \n618: \t\t// Reconfigure any plugins\n619: \t\tfor (const [pluginName, config] of this.pluginManager.configurations()) {\n620: \t\t\tthis.configurePlugin(pluginName, config);\n621: \t\t}\n622: \t}\n623: \n624: \tprivate setCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(configuration: TypeScriptServiceConfiguration): void {\n625: \t\tconst args: Proto.SetCompilerOptionsForInferredProjectsArgs = {\n626: \t\t\toptions: this.getCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(configuration)\n627: \t\t};\n628: \t\tthis.executeWithoutWaitingForResponse('compilerOptionsForInferredProjects', args);\n629: \t}\n630: \n631: \tprivate getCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(configuration: TypeScriptServiceConfiguration): Proto.ExternalProjectCompilerOptions {\n632: \t\treturn {\n633: \t\t\t...inferredProjectCompilerOptions(this.apiVersion, ProjectType.TypeScript, configuration),\n634: \t\t\tallowJs: true,\n635: \t\t\tallowSyntheticDefaultImports: true,\n636: \t\t\tallowNonTsExtensions: true,\n637: \t\t\tresolveJsonModule: true,\n638: \t\t};\n639: \t}\n640: \n641: \tprivate serviceExited(restart: boolean, tsVersion: API): void {\n642: \t\tthis.resetWatchers();\n643: \t\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\n644: \n645: \t\tthis.serverState = ServerState.None;\n646: \n647: \t\tif (restart) {\n648: \t\t\tconst diff = Date.now() - this.lastStart;\n649: \t\t\tthis.numberRestarts++;\n650: \t\t\tlet startService = true;\n651: \n652: \t\t\tconst pluginExtensionList = this.pluginManager.plugins.map(plugin => plugin.extension.id).join(', ');\n653: \t\t\tconst reportIssueItem: vscode.MessageItem = {\n654: \t\t\t\ttitle: vscode.l10n.t(\"Report Issue\"),\n655: \t\t\t};\n656: \t\t\tlet prompt: Thenable<undefined | vscode.MessageItem> | undefined = undefined;\n657: \n658: \t\t\tif (this.numberRestarts > 5) {\n659: \t\t\t\tthis.numberRestarts = 0;\n660: \t\t\t\tif (diff < 10 * 1000 /* 10 seconds */) {\n661: \t\t\t\t\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\n662: \t\t\t\t\tstartService = false;\n663: \t\t\t\t\tthis.hasServerFatallyCrashedTooManyTimes = true;\n664: \t\t\t\t\tif (this.pluginManager.plugins.length) {\n665: \t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showErrorMessage<vscode.MessageItem>(\n666: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service immediately crashed 5 times. The service will not be restarted.\\nThis may be caused by a plugin contributed by one of these extensions: {0}.\\nPlease try disabling these extensions before filing an issue against VS Code.\", pluginExtensionList));\n667: \t\t\t\t\t} else {\n668: \t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n669: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service immediately crashed 5 times. The service will not be restarted.\"),\n670: \t\t\t\t\t\t\treportIssueItem);\n671: \t\t\t\t\t}\n672: \n673: \t\t\t\t\t/* __GDPR__\n674: \t\t\t\t\t\t\"serviceExited\" : {\n675: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n676: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n677: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\"\n678: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t]\n679: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n680: \t\t\t\t\t*/\n681: \t\t\t\t\tthis.logTelemetry('serviceExited');\n682: \t\t\t\t} else if (diff < 60 * 1000 * 5 /* 5 Minutes */) {\n683: \t\t\t\t\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\n684: \t\t\t\t\tif (!this._isPromptingAfterCrash) {\n685: \t\t\t\t\t\tif (this.pluginManager.plugins.length) {\n686: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showWarningMessage<vscode.MessageItem>(\n687: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service crashed 5 times in the last 5 Minutes.\\nThis may be caused by a plugin contributed by one of these extensions: {0}\\nPlease try disabling these extensions before filing an issue against VS Code.\", pluginExtensionList));\n688: \t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n689: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n690: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service crashed 5 times in the last 5 Minutes.\"),\n691: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\treportIssueItem);\n692: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n693: \t\t\t\t\t}\n694: \t\t\t\t}\n695: \t\t\t} else if (['vscode-insiders', 'code-oss'].includes(vscode.env.uriScheme)) {\n696: \t\t\t\t// Prompt after a single restart\n697: \t\t\t\tthis.numberRestarts = 0;\n698: \t\t\t\tif (!this._isPromptingAfterCrash) {\n699: \t\t\t\t\tif (this.pluginManager.plugins.length) {\n700: \t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showWarningMessage<vscode.MessageItem>(\n701: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service crashed.\\nThis may be caused by a plugin contributed by one of these extensions: {0}.\\nPlease try disabling these extensions before filing an issue against VS Code.\", pluginExtensionList));\n702: \t\t\t\t\t} else {\n703: \t\t\t\t\t\tprompt = vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n704: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"The JS/TS language service crashed.\"),\n705: \t\t\t\t\t\t\treportIssueItem);\n706: \t\t\t\t\t}\n707: \t\t\t\t}\n708: \t\t\t}\n709: \n710: \t\t\tif (prompt) {\n711: \t\t\t\tthis._isPromptingAfterCrash = true;\n712: \t\t\t}\n713: \n714: \t\t\tprompt?.then(async item => {\n715: \t\t\t\tthis._isPromptingAfterCrash = false;\n716: \n717: \t\t\t\tif (item === reportIssueItem) {\n718: \n719: \t\t\t\t\tconst minModernTsVersion = this.versionProvider.bundledVersion.apiVersion;\n720: \n721: \t\t\t\t\t// Don't allow reporting issues using the PnP patched version of TS Server\n722: \t\t\t\t\tif (tsVersion.isYarnPnp()) {\n723: \t\t\t\t\t\tconst reportIssue: vscode.MessageItem = {\n724: \t\t\t\t\t\t\ttitle: vscode.l10n.t(\"Report issue against Yarn PnP\"),\n725: \t\t\t\t\t\t};\n726: \t\t\t\t\t\tconst response = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n727: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"Please report an issue against Yarn PnP\"),\n728: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n729: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmodal: true,\n730: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdetail: vscode.l10n.t(\"The workspace is using a version of the TypeScript Server that has been patched by Yarn PnP. This patching is a common source of bugs.\"),\n731: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n732: \t\t\t\t\t\t\treportIssue);\n733: \n734: \t\t\t\t\t\tif (response === reportIssue) {\n735: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://github.com/yarnpkg/berry/issues'));\n736: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n737: \t\t\t\t\t}\n738: \t\t\t\t\t// Don't allow reporting issues with old TS versions\n739: \t\t\t\t\telse if (\n740: \t\t\t\t\t\tminModernTsVersion &&\n741: \t\t\t\t\t\ttsVersion.lt(minModernTsVersion)\n742: \t\t\t\t\t) {\n743: \t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n744: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.l10n.t(\"Please update your TypeScript version\"),\n745: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n746: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmodal: true,\n747: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdetail: vscode.l10n.t(\n748: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"The workspace is using an old version of TypeScript ({0}).\\n\\nBefore reporting an issue, please update the workspace to use TypeScript {1} or newer to make sure the bug has not already been fixed.\",\n749: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttsVersion.displayName,\n750: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tminModernTsVersion.displayName),\n751: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n752: \t\t\t\t\t} else {\n753: \t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/wiki/TypeScript-Issues'));\n754: \t\t\t\t\t}\n755: \t\t\t\t}\n756: \t\t\t});\n757: \n758: \t\t\tif (startService) {\n759: \t\t\t\tthis.startService(true);\n760: \t\t\t}\n761: \t\t}\n762: \t}\n763: \n764: \tpublic toTsFilePath(resource: vscode.Uri): string | undefined {\n765: \t\tif (fileSchemes.disabledSchemes.has(resource.scheme)) {\n766: \t\t\treturn undefined;\n767: \t\t}\n768: \n769: \t\tif (resource.scheme === fileSchemes.file && !isWeb()) {\n770: \t\t\treturn resource.fsPath;\n771: \t\t}\n772: \n773: \t\treturn (this.isProjectWideIntellisenseOnWebEnabled() ? '' : inMemoryResourcePrefix)\n774: \t\t\t+ '/' + resource.scheme\n775: \t\t\t+ '/' + (resource.authority || emptyAuthority)\n776: \t\t\t+ (resource.path.startsWith('/') ? resource.path : '/' + resource.path)\n777: \t\t\t+ (resource.fragment ? '#' + resource.fragment : '');\n778: \t}\n779: \n780: \n781: \tpublic toOpenTsFilePath(document: vscode.TextDocument | vscode.Uri, options: { suppressAlertOnFailure?: boolean } = {}): string | undefined {\n782: \t\tconst uri = document instanceof vscode.Uri ? document : document.uri;\n783: \t\tif (!this.bufferSyncSupport.ensureHasBuffer(uri)) {\n784: \t\t\tif (!options.suppressAlertOnFailure && !fileSchemes.disabledSchemes.has(uri.scheme)) {\n785: \t\t\t\tconsole.error(`Unexpected resource ${uri}`);\n786: \t\t\t}\n787: \t\t\treturn undefined;\n788: \t\t}\n789: \t\treturn this.toTsFilePath(uri);\n790: \t}\n791: \n792: \tpublic hasCapabilityForResource(resource: vscode.Uri, capability: ClientCapability): boolean {\n793: \t\tif (!this.capabilities.has(capability)) {\n794: \t\t\treturn false;\n795: \t\t}\n796: \n797: \t\tswitch (capability) {\n798: \t\t\tcase ClientCapability.Semantic: {\n799: \t\t\t\treturn fileSchemes.getSemanticSupportedSchemes().includes(resource.scheme);\n800: \t\t\t}\n801: \t\t\tcase ClientCapability.Syntax:\n802: \t\t\tcase ClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax: {\n803: \t\t\t\treturn true;\n804: \t\t\t}\n805: \t\t}\n806: \t}\n807: \n808: \tpublic toResource(filepath: string): vscode.Uri {\n809: \t\tif (isWeb()) {\n810: \t\t\t// On web, the stdlib paths that TS return look like: '/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts'\n811: \t\t\t// TODO: Find out what extensionUri is when testing (should be http://localhost:8080/static/sources/extensions/typescript-language-features/)\n812: \t\t\t// TODO:  make sure that this code path is getting hit\n813: \t\t\tif (filepath.startsWith('/lib.') && filepath.endsWith('.d.ts')) {\n814: \t\t\t\treturn vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'dist', 'browser', 'typescript', filepath.slice(1));\n815: \t\t\t}\n816: \t\t\tconst parts = filepath.match(/^\\/([^\\/]+)\\/([^\\/]*)\\/(.+)$/);\n817: \t\t\tif (parts) {\n818: \t\t\t\tconst resource = vscode.Uri.parse(parts[1] + '://' + (parts[2] === emptyAuthority ? '' : parts[2]) + '/' + parts[3]);\n819: \t\t\t\treturn this.bufferSyncSupport.toVsCodeResource(resource);\n820: \t\t\t}\n821: \t\t}\n822: \n823: \t\tif (filepath.startsWith(inMemoryResourcePrefix)) {\n824: \t\t\tconst parts = filepath.match(/^\\^\\/([^\\/]+)\\/([^\\/]*)\\/(.+)$/);\n825: \t\t\tif (parts) {\n826: \t\t\t\tconst resource = vscode.Uri.parse(parts[1] + '://' + (parts[2] === emptyAuthority ? '' : parts[2]) + '/' + parts[3]);\n827: \t\t\t\treturn this.bufferSyncSupport.toVsCodeResource(resource);\n828: \t\t\t}\n829: \t\t}\n830: \t\treturn this.bufferSyncSupport.toResource(filepath);\n831: \t}\n832: \n833: \tpublic getWorkspaceRootForResource(resource: vscode.Uri): vscode.Uri | undefined {\n834: \t\tconst roots = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders ? Array.from(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders) : undefined;\n835: \t\tif (!roots?.length) {\n836: \t\t\treturn undefined;\n837: \t\t}\n838: \n839: \t\t// For notebook cells, we need to use the notebook document to look up the workspace\n840: \t\tif (resource.scheme === Schemes.notebookCell) {\n841: \t\t\tfor (const notebook of vscode.workspace.notebookDocuments) {\n842: \t\t\t\tfor (const cell of notebook.getCells()) {\n843: \t\t\t\t\tif (cell.document.uri.toString() === resource.toString()) {\n844: \t\t\t\t\t\tresource = notebook.uri;\n845: \t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n846: \t\t\t\t\t}\n847: \t\t\t\t}\n848: \t\t\t}\n849: \t\t}\n850: \n851: \t\tfor (const root of roots.sort((a, b) => a.uri.fsPath.length - b.uri.fsPath.length)) {\n852: \t\t\tif (root.uri.scheme === resource.scheme && root.uri.authority === resource.authority) {\n853: \t\t\t\tif (resource.fsPath.startsWith(root.uri.fsPath + path.sep)) {\n854: \t\t\t\t\treturn root.uri;\n855: \t\t\t\t}\n856: \t\t\t}\n857: \t\t}\n858: \n859: \t\treturn vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(resource)?.uri;\n860: \t}\n861: \n862: \tpublic execute(command: keyof TypeScriptRequests, args: any, token: vscode.CancellationToken, config?: ExecConfig): Promise<ServerResponse.Response<Proto.Response>> {\n863: \t\tlet executions: Array<Promise<ServerResponse.Response<Proto.Response>> | undefined> | undefined;\n864: \n865: \t\tif (config?.cancelOnResourceChange) {\n866: \t\t\tconst runningServerState = this.serverState;\n867: \t\t\tif (runningServerState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n868: \t\t\t\tconst source = new vscode.CancellationTokenSource();\n869: \t\t\t\ttoken.onCancellationRequested(() => source.cancel());\n870: \n871: \t\t\t\tconst inFlight: ToCancelOnResourceChanged = {\n872: \t\t\t\t\tresource: config.cancelOnResourceChange,\n873: \t\t\t\t\tcancel: () => source.cancel(),\n874: \t\t\t\t};\n875: \t\t\t\trunningServerState.toCancelOnResourceChange.add(inFlight);\n876: \n877: \t\t\t\texecutions = this.executeImpl(command, args, {\n878: \t\t\t\t\tisAsync: false,\n879: \t\t\t\t\ttoken: source.token,\n880: \t\t\t\t\texpectsResult: true,\n881: \t\t\t\t\t...config,\n882: \t\t\t\t});\n883: \t\t\t\texecutions[0]!.finally(() => {\n884: \t\t\t\t\trunningServerState.toCancelOnResourceChange.delete(inFlight);\n885: \t\t\t\t\tsource.dispose();\n886: \t\t\t\t});\n887: \t\t\t}\n888: \t\t}\n889: \n890: \t\tif (!executions) {\n891: \t\t\texecutions = this.executeImpl(command, args, {\n892: \t\t\t\tisAsync: false,\n893: \t\t\t\ttoken,\n894: \t\t\t\texpectsResult: true,\n895: \t\t\t\t...config,\n896: \t\t\t});\n897: \t\t}\n898: \n899: \t\tif (config?.nonRecoverable) {\n900: \t\t\texecutions[0]!.catch(err => this.fatalError(command, err));\n901: \t\t}\n902: \n903: \t\tif (command === 'updateOpen') {\n904: \t\t\t// If update open has completed, consider that the project has loaded\n905: \t\t\tconst updateOpenTask = Promise.all(executions).then(() => {\n906: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\n907: \t\t\t});\n908: \n909: \t\t\tconst updateOpenArgs = (args as Proto.UpdateOpenRequestArgs);\n910: \t\t\tif (updateOpenArgs.openFiles?.length === 1) {\n911: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.startedLoadingFile(updateOpenArgs.openFiles[0].file, updateOpenTask);\n912: \t\t\t}\n913: \t\t}\n914: \n915: \t\treturn executions[0]!;\n916: \t}\n917: \n918: \tpublic executeWithoutWaitingForResponse(command: keyof TypeScriptRequests, args: any): void {\n919: \t\tthis.executeImpl(command, args, {\n920: \t\t\tisAsync: false,\n921: \t\t\ttoken: undefined,\n922: \t\t\texpectsResult: false\n923: \t\t});\n924: \t}\n925: \n926: \tpublic executeAsync(command: keyof TypeScriptRequests, args: Proto.GeterrRequestArgs, token: vscode.CancellationToken): Promise<ServerResponse.Response<Proto.Response>> {\n927: \t\treturn this.executeImpl(command, args, {\n928: \t\t\tisAsync: true,\n929: \t\t\ttoken,\n930: \t\t\texpectsResult: true\n931: \t\t})[0]!;\n932: \t}\n933: \n934: \tprivate executeImpl(command: keyof TypeScriptRequests, args: any, executeInfo: { isAsync: boolean; token?: vscode.CancellationToken; expectsResult: boolean; lowPriority?: boolean; requireSemantic?: boolean }): Array<Promise<ServerResponse.Response<Proto.Response>> | undefined> {\n935: \t\tconst serverState = this.serverState;\n936: \t\tif (serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n937: \t\t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.beforeCommand(command);\n938: \t\t\treturn serverState.server.executeImpl(command, args, executeInfo);\n939: \t\t} else {\n940: \t\t\treturn [Promise.resolve(ServerResponse.NoServer)];\n941: \t\t}\n942: \t}\n943: \n944: \tpublic interruptGetErr<R>(f: () => R): R {\n945: \t\treturn this.bufferSyncSupport.interruptGetErr(f);\n946: \t}\n947: \n948: \tprivate fatalError(command: string, error: unknown): void {\n949: \t\t/* __GDPR__\n950: \t\t\t\"fatalError\" : {\n951: \t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n952: \t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n953: \t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\",\n954: \t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptRequestErrorProperties}\"\n955: \t\t\t\t],\n956: \t\t\t\t\"command\" : { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" }\n957: \t\t\t}\n958: \t\t*/\n959: \t\tthis.logTelemetry('fatalError', { ...(error instanceof TypeScriptServerError ? error.telemetry : { command }) });\n960: \t\tconsole.error(`A non-recoverable error occurred while executing tsserver command: ${command}`);\n961: \t\tif (error instanceof TypeScriptServerError && error.serverErrorText) {\n962: \t\t\tconsole.error(error.serverErrorText);\n963: \t\t}\n964: \n965: \t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n966: \t\t\tthis.info('Killing TS Server');\n967: \t\t\tconst logfile = this.serverState.server.tsServerLog;\n968: \t\t\tthis.serverState.server.kill();\n969: \t\t\tif (error instanceof TypeScriptServerError) {\n970: \t\t\t\tthis.serverState = new ServerState.Errored(error, logfile);\n971: \t\t\t}\n972: \t\t}\n973: \t}\n974: \n975: \tprivate dispatchEvent(event: Proto.Event) {\n976: \t\tswitch (event.event) {\n977: \t\t\tcase EventName.syntaxDiag:\n978: \t\t\tcase EventName.semanticDiag:\n979: \t\t\tcase EventName.suggestionDiag:\n980: \t\t\tcase EventName.regionSemanticDiag: {\n981: \t\t\t\t// This event also roughly signals that projects have been loaded successfully (since the TS server is synchronous)\n982: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\n983: \n984: \t\t\t\tconst diagnosticEvent = event as Proto.DiagnosticEvent;\n985: \t\t\t\tif (diagnosticEvent.body?.diagnostics) {\n986: \t\t\t\t\tthis._onDiagnosticsReceived.fire({\n987: \t\t\t\t\t\tkind: getDiagnosticsKind(event),\n988: \t\t\t\t\t\tresource: this.toResource(diagnosticEvent.body.file),\n989: \t\t\t\t\t\tdiagnostics: diagnosticEvent.body.diagnostics,\n990: \t\t\t\t\t\tspans: diagnosticEvent.body.spans,\n991: \t\t\t\t\t});\n992: \t\t\t\t}\n993: \t\t\t\treturn;\n994: \t\t\t}\n995: \t\t\tcase EventName.configFileDiag:\n996: \t\t\t\tthis._onConfigDiagnosticsReceived.fire(event as Proto.ConfigFileDiagnosticEvent);\n997: \t\t\t\treturn;\n998: \n999: \t\t\tcase EventName.telemetry: {\n1000: \t\t\t\tconst body = (event as Proto.TelemetryEvent).body;\n1001: \t\t\t\tthis.dispatchTelemetryEvent(body);\n1002: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1003: \t\t\t}\n1004: \t\t\tcase EventName.projectLanguageServiceState: {\n1005: \t\t\t\tconst body = (event as Proto.ProjectLanguageServiceStateEvent).body!;\n1006: \t\t\t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n1007: \t\t\t\t\tthis.serverState.updateLanguageServiceEnabled(body.languageServiceEnabled);\n1008: \t\t\t\t}\n1009: \t\t\t\tthis._onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged.fire(body);\n1010: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1011: \t\t\t}\n1012: \t\t\tcase EventName.projectsUpdatedInBackground: {\n1013: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\n1014: \n1015: \t\t\t\tconst body = (event as Proto.ProjectsUpdatedInBackgroundEvent).body;\n1016: \t\t\t\tconst resources = body.openFiles.map(file => this.toResource(file));\n1017: \t\t\t\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.getErr(resources);\n1018: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1019: \t\t\t}\n1020: \t\t\tcase EventName.beginInstallTypes:\n1021: \t\t\t\tthis._onDidBeginInstallTypings.fire((event as Proto.BeginInstallTypesEvent).body);\n1022: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1023: \n1024: \t\t\tcase EventName.endInstallTypes:\n1025: \t\t\t\tthis._onDidEndInstallTypings.fire((event as Proto.EndInstallTypesEvent).body);\n1026: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1027: \n1028: \t\t\tcase EventName.typesInstallerInitializationFailed:\n1029: \t\t\t\tthis._onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed.fire((event as Proto.TypesInstallerInitializationFailedEvent).body);\n1030: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1031: \n1032: \t\t\tcase EventName.surveyReady:\n1033: \t\t\t\tthis._onSurveyReady.fire((event as Proto.SurveyReadyEvent).body);\n1034: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1035: \n1036: \t\t\tcase EventName.projectLoadingStart:\n1037: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.startedLoadingProject((event as Proto.ProjectLoadingStartEvent).body.projectName);\n1038: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1039: \n1040: \t\t\tcase EventName.projectLoadingFinish:\n1041: \t\t\t\tthis.loadingIndicator.finishedLoadingProject((event as Proto.ProjectLoadingFinishEvent).body.projectName);\n1042: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1043: \n1044: \t\t\tcase EventName.createDirectoryWatcher: {\n1045: \t\t\t\tconst fpath = (event.body as Proto.CreateDirectoryWatcherEventBody).path;\n1046: \t\t\t\tif (fpath.startsWith(inMemoryResourcePrefix)) {\n1047: \t\t\t\t\treturn;\n1048: \t\t\t\t}\n1049: \t\t\t\tif (process.platform === 'darwin' && fpath === path.join(homedir(), 'Library')) {\n1050: \t\t\t\t\t// ignore directory watch requests on ~/Library\n1051: \t\t\t\t\t// until microsoft/TypeScript#59831 is resolved\n1052: \t\t\t\t\treturn;\n1053: \t\t\t\t}\n1054: \n1055: \t\t\t\tthis.createFileSystemWatcher(\n1056: \t\t\t\t\t(event.body as Proto.CreateDirectoryWatcherEventBody).id,\n1057: \t\t\t\t\tnew vscode.RelativePattern(\n1058: \t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.Uri.file(fpath),\n1059: \t\t\t\t\t\t(event.body as Proto.CreateDirectoryWatcherEventBody).recursive ? '**' : '*'\n1060: \t\t\t\t\t),\n1061: \t\t\t\t\t(event.body as Proto.CreateDirectoryWatcherEventBody).ignoreUpdate\n1062: \t\t\t\t);\n1063: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1064: \t\t\t}\n1065: \t\t\tcase EventName.createFileWatcher: {\n1066: \t\t\t\tconst path = (event.body as Proto.CreateFileWatcherEventBody).path;\n1067: \t\t\t\tif (path.startsWith(inMemoryResourcePrefix)) {\n1068: \t\t\t\t\treturn;\n1069: \t\t\t\t}\n1070: \n1071: \t\t\t\tthis.createFileSystemWatcher(\n1072: \t\t\t\t\t(event.body as Proto.CreateFileWatcherEventBody).id,\n1073: \t\t\t\t\tnew vscode.RelativePattern(\n1074: \t\t\t\t\t\tvscode.Uri.file(path),\n1075: \t\t\t\t\t\t'*'\n1076: \t\t\t\t\t)\n1077: \t\t\t\t);\n1078: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1079: \t\t\t}\n1080: \t\t\tcase EventName.closeFileWatcher:\n1081: \t\t\t\tthis.closeFileSystemWatcher(event.body.id);\n1082: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1083: \n1084: \t\t\tcase EventName.requestCompleted: {\n1085: \t\t\t\tconst diagnosticsDuration = (event.body as Proto.RequestCompletedEventBody).performanceData?.diagnosticsDuration;\n1086: \t\t\t\tif (diagnosticsDuration) {\n1087: \t\t\t\t\tthis.diagnosticsManager.logDiagnosticsPerformanceTelemetry(\n1088: \t\t\t\t\t\tdiagnosticsDuration.map(fileData => {\n1089: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst resource = this.toResource(fileData.file);\n1090: \t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn {\n1091: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t...fileData,\n1092: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfileLineCount: this.bufferSyncSupport.lineCount(resource),\n1093: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t};\n1094: \t\t\t\t\t\t})\n1095: \t\t\t\t\t);\n1096: \t\t\t\t}\n1097: \t\t\t\treturn;\n1098: \t\t\t}\n1099: \t\t}\n1100: \t}\n1101: \n1102: \tprivate scheduleExecuteWatchChangeRequest() {\n1103: \t\tif (!this.watchChangeTimeout) {\n1104: \t\t\tthis.watchChangeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {\n1105: \t\t\t\tthis.watchChangeTimeout = undefined;\n1106: \t\t\t\tconst allEvents = Array.from(this.watchEvents, ([id, event]) => ({\n1107: \t\t\t\t\tid,\n1108: \t\t\t\t\tupdated: event.updated && Array.from(event.updated),\n1109: \t\t\t\t\tcreated: event.created && Array.from(event.created),\n1110: \t\t\t\t\tdeleted: event.deleted && Array.from(event.deleted)\n1111: \t\t\t\t}));\n1112: \t\t\t\tthis.watchEvents.clear();\n1113: \t\t\t\tthis.executeWithoutWaitingForResponse('watchChange', allEvents);\n1114: \t\t\t}, 100); /* aggregate events over 100ms to reduce client<->server IPC overhead */\n1115: \t\t}\n1116: \t}\n1117: \n1118: \tprivate addWatchEvent(id: number, eventType: keyof WatchEvent, path: string) {\n1119: \t\tlet event = this.watchEvents.get(id);\n1120: \t\tconst removeEvent = (typeOfEventToRemove: keyof WatchEvent) => {\n1121: \t\t\tif (event?.[typeOfEventToRemove]?.delete(path) && event[typeOfEventToRemove].size === 0) {\n1122: \t\t\t\tevent[typeOfEventToRemove] = undefined;\n1123: \t\t\t}\n1124: \t\t};\n1125: \t\tconst aggregateEvent = () => {\n1126: \t\t\tif (!event) {\n1127: \t\t\t\tthis.watchEvents.set(id, event = {});\n1128: \t\t\t}\n1129: \t\t\t(event[eventType] ??= new Set()).add(path);\n1130: \t\t};\n1131: \t\tswitch (eventType) {\n1132: \t\t\tcase 'created':\n1133: \t\t\t\tremoveEvent('deleted');\n1134: \t\t\t\tremoveEvent('updated');\n1135: \t\t\t\taggregateEvent();\n1136: \t\t\t\tbreak;\n1137: \t\t\tcase 'deleted':\n1138: \t\t\t\tremoveEvent('created');\n1139: \t\t\t\tremoveEvent('updated');\n1140: \t\t\t\taggregateEvent();\n1141: \t\t\t\tbreak;\n1142: \t\t\tcase 'updated':\n1143: \t\t\t\tif (event?.created?.has(path)) {\n1144: \t\t\t\t\treturn;\n1145: \t\t\t\t}\n1146: \t\t\t\tremoveEvent('deleted');\n1147: \t\t\t\taggregateEvent();\n1148: \t\t\t\tbreak;\n1149: \t\t}\n1150: \t\tthis.scheduleExecuteWatchChangeRequest();\n1151: \t}\n1152: \n1153: \tprivate createFileSystemWatcher(\n1154: \t\tid: number,\n1155: \t\tpattern: vscode.RelativePattern,\n1156: \t\tignoreChangeEvents?: boolean,\n1157: \t) {\n1158: \t\tconst disposable = new DisposableStore();\n1159: \t\tconst watcher = disposable.add(vscode.workspace.createFileSystemWatcher(pattern, undefined, ignoreChangeEvents));\n1160: \t\tdisposable.add(watcher.onDidChange(changeFile =>\n1161: \t\t\tthis.addWatchEvent(id, 'updated', changeFile.fsPath)\n1162: \t\t));\n1163: \t\tdisposable.add(watcher.onDidCreate(createFile =>\n1164: \t\t\tthis.addWatchEvent(id, 'created', createFile.fsPath)\n1165: \t\t));\n1166: \t\tdisposable.add(watcher.onDidDelete(deletedFile =>\n1167: \t\t\tthis.addWatchEvent(id, 'deleted', deletedFile.fsPath)\n1168: \t\t));\n1169: \t\tdisposable.add({\n1170: \t\t\tdispose: () => {\n1171: \t\t\t\tthis.watchEvents.delete(id);\n1172: \t\t\t\tthis.watches.delete(id);\n1173: \t\t\t}\n1174: \t\t});\n1175: \n1176: \t\tif (this.watches.has(id)) {\n1177: \t\t\tthis.closeFileSystemWatcher(id);\n1178: \t\t}\n1179: \t\tthis.watches.set(id, disposable);\n1180: \t}\n1181: \n1182: \tprivate closeFileSystemWatcher(id: number) {\n1183: \t\tconst existing = this.watches.get(id);\n1184: \t\texisting?.dispose();\n1185: \t}\n1186: \n1187: \tprivate dispatchTelemetryEvent(telemetryData: Proto.TelemetryEventBody): void {\n1188: \t\tconst properties: { [key: string]: string } = Object.create(null);\n1189: \t\tswitch (telemetryData.telemetryEventName) {\n1190: \t\t\tcase 'typingsInstalled': {\n1191: \t\t\t\tconst typingsInstalledPayload: Proto.TypingsInstalledTelemetryEventPayload = (telemetryData.payload as Proto.TypingsInstalledTelemetryEventPayload);\n1192: \t\t\t\tproperties['installedPackages'] = typingsInstalledPayload.installedPackages;\n1193: \n1194: \t\t\t\tif (typeof typingsInstalledPayload.installSuccess === 'boolean') {\n1195: \t\t\t\t\tproperties['installSuccess'] = typingsInstalledPayload.installSuccess.toString();\n1196: \t\t\t\t}\n1197: \t\t\t\tif (typeof typingsInstalledPayload.typingsInstallerVersion === 'string') {\n1198: \t\t\t\t\tproperties['typingsInstallerVersion'] = typingsInstalledPayload.typingsInstallerVersion;\n1199: \t\t\t\t}\n1200: \t\t\t\tbreak;\n1201: \t\t\t}\n1202: \t\t\tdefault: {\n1203: \t\t\t\tconst payload = telemetryData.payload;\n1204: \t\t\t\tif (payload) {\n1205: \t\t\t\t\tObject.keys(payload).forEach((key) => {\n1206: \t\t\t\t\t\ttry {\n1207: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (payload.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\n1208: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tproperties[key] = typeof payload[key] === 'string' ? payload[key] : JSON.stringify(payload[key]);\n1209: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n1210: \t\t\t\t\t\t} catch (e) {\n1211: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t// noop\n1212: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n1213: \t\t\t\t\t});\n1214: \t\t\t\t}\n1215: \t\t\t\tbreak;\n1216: \t\t\t}\n1217: \t\t}\n1218: \n1219: \t\t// Add plugin data here\n1220: \t\tif (telemetryData.telemetryEventName === 'projectInfo') {\n1221: \t\t\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\n1222: \t\t\t\tthis.serverState.updateTsserverVersion(properties['version']);\n1223: \t\t\t}\n1224: \t\t}\n1225: \n1226: \t\t/* __GDPR__\n1227: \t\t\t\"typingsInstalled\" : {\n1228: \t\t\t\t\"owner\": \"mjbvz\",\n1229: \t\t\t\t\"installedPackages\" : { \"classification\": \"PublicNonPersonalData\", \"purpose\": \"FeatureInsight\" },\n1230: \t\t\t\t\"installSuccess\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"PerformanceAndHealth\" },\n1231: \t\t\t\t\"typingsInstallerVersion\": { \"classification\": \"SystemMetaData\", \"purpose\": \"PerformanceAndHealth\" },\n1232: \t\t\t\t\"${include}\": [\n1233: \t\t\t\t\t\"${TypeScriptCommonProperties}\"\n1234: \t\t\t\t]\n1235: \t\t\t}\n1236: \t\t*/\n1237: \t\t// __GDPR__COMMENT__: Other events are defined by TypeScript.\n1238: \t\tthis.logTelemetry(telemetryData.telemetryEventName, properties);\n1239: \t}\n1240: \n1241: \tprivate configurePlugin(pluginName: string, configuration: {}): any {\n1242: \t\tthis.executeWithoutWaitingForResponse('configurePlugin', { pluginName, configuration });\n1243: \t}\n1244: }\n1245: \n1246: function getDiagnosticsKind(event: Proto.Event) {\n1247: \tswitch (event.event) {\n1248: \t\tcase 'syntaxDiag': return DiagnosticKind.Syntax;\n1249: \t\tcase 'semanticDiag': return DiagnosticKind.Semantic;\n1250: \t\tcase 'suggestionDiag': return DiagnosticKind.Suggestion;\n1251: \t\tcase 'regionSemanticDiag': return DiagnosticKind.RegionSemantic;\n1252: \t}\n1253: \tthrow new Error('Unknown dignostics kind');\n1254: }\n1255: \n1256: class ServerInitializingIndicator extends Disposable {\n1257: \n1258: \tprivate _task?: { project: string; resolve: () => void };\n1259: \n1260: \tconstructor(\n1261: \t\tprivate readonly client: ITypeScriptServiceClient,\n1262: \t) {\n1263: \t\tsuper();\n1264: \t}\n1265: \n1266: \tpublic reset(): void {\n1267: \t\tif (this._task) {\n1268: \t\t\tthis._task.resolve();\n1269: \t\t\tthis._task = undefined;\n1270: \t\t}\n1271: \t}\n1272: \n1273: \t/**\n1274: \t * Signal that a project has started loading.\n1275: \t */\n1276: \tpublic startedLoadingProject(projectName: string): void {\n1277: \t\t// TS projects are loaded sequentially. Cancel existing task because it should always be resolved before\n1278: \t\t// the incoming project loading task is.\n1279: \t\tthis.reset();\n1280: \n1281: \t\tconst projectDisplayName = this.getProjectDisplayName(projectName);\n1282: \n1283: \t\tvscode.window.withProgress({\n1284: \t\t\tlocation: vscode.ProgressLocation.Window,\n1285: \t\t\ttitle: vscode.l10n.t(\"Initializing '{0}'\", projectDisplayName),\n1286: \t\t}, () => new Promise<void>(resolve => {\n1287: \t\t\tthis._task = { project: projectName, resolve };\n1288: \t\t}));\n1289: \t}\n1290: \n1291: \tprivate getProjectDisplayName(projectName: string): string {\n1292: \t\tconst projectUri = this.client.toResource(projectName);\n1293: \t\tconst relPath = vscode.workspace.asRelativePath(projectUri);\n1294: \n1295: \t\tconst maxDisplayLength = 60;\n1296: \t\tif (relPath.length > maxDisplayLength) {\n1297: \t\t\treturn '...' + relPath.slice(-maxDisplayLength);\n1298: \t\t}\n1299: \n1300: \t\treturn relPath;\n1301: \t}\n1302: \n1303: \tpublic startedLoadingFile(fileName: string, task: Promise<unknown>): void {\n1304: \t\tif (!this._task) {\n1305: \t\t\tvscode.window.withProgress({\n1306: \t\t\t\tlocation: vscode.ProgressLocation.Window,\n1307: \t\t\t\ttitle: vscode.l10n.t(\"Analyzing '{0}' and its dependencies\", path.basename(fileName)),\n1308: \t\t\t}, () => task);\n1309: \t\t}\n1310: \t}\n1311: \n1312: \tpublic finishedLoadingProject(projectName: string): void {\n1313: \t\tif (this._task && this._task.project === projectName) {\n1314: \t\t\tthis._task.resolve();\n1315: \t\t\tthis._task = undefined;\n1316: \t\t}\n1317: \t}\n1318: }\n1319: ",

\\t\\tthis.versionProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\\n186: \\n187: \\t\\tthis.pluginPathsProvider = new TypeScriptPluginPathsProvider(this._configuration);\\n188: \\t\\tthis._register(this._versionManager.onDidPickNewVersion(() => {\\n190: \\t\\t\\tthis.restartTsServer();\\n191: \\t\\t}));\\n192: \\n193: \\t\\tthis._nodeVersionManager = this._register(new NodeVersionManager(this._configuration, context.workspaceState));\\n194: \\t\\tthis._register(this._nodeVersionManager.onDidPickNewVersion(() => {\\n195: \\t\\t\\tthis.restartTsServer();\\n196: \\t\\t}));\\n197: \\n198: \\t\\tthis.bufferSyncSupport = new BufferSyncSupport(this, allModeIds, onCaseInsensitiveFileSystem);\\n199: \\t\\tthis.onReady(() => { this.bufferSyncSupport.listen(); });\\n200: \\n201: \\t\\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.onDelete(resource => {\\n202: \\t\\t\\tthis.cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource);\\n203: \\t\\t\\tthis.diagnosticsManager.deleteAllDiagnosticsInFile(resource);\\n204: \\t\\t}, null, this._disposables);\\n205: \\n206: \\t\\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.onWillChange(resource => {\\n207: \\t\\t\\tthis.cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource);\\n208: \\t\\t});\\n209: \\n210: \\t\\tvscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(() => {\\n211: \\t\\t\\tconst oldConfiguration = this._configuration;\\n212: \\t\\t\\tthis._configuration = services.serviceConfigurationProvider.loadFromWorkspace();\\n213: \\n214: \\t\\t\\tthis.versionProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\\n215: \\t\\t\\tthis._versionManager.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\\n216: \\t\\t\\tthis.pluginPathsProvider.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\\n217: \\t\\t\\tthis._nodeVersionManager.updateConfiguration(this._configuration);\\n218: \\n219: \\t\\t\\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\\n220: \\t\\t\\t\\tif (!this._configuration.implicitProjectConfiguration.isEqualTo(oldConfiguration.implicitProjectConfiguration)) {\\n221: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tthis.setCompilerOptionsForInferredProjects(this._configuration);\\n222: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n223: \\n224: \\t\\t\\t\\tif (!areServiceConfigurationsEqual(this._configuration, VSCodeTelemetryReporter(services.experimentTelemetryReporter, () => {\\n231: \\t\\t\\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\\n232: \\t\\t\\t\\tif (this.serverState.tsserverVersion) {\\n233: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn this.serverState.tsserverVersion;\\n234: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n235: \\t\\t\\t}\\n236: \\t\\t\\treturn this.apiVersion.fullVersionString;\\n237: \\t\\t});\\n238: \\n239: \\t\\tthis.diagnosticsManager = new DiagnosticsManager('typescript', this._configuration, this.telemetryReporter, onCaseInsensitiveFileSystem);\\n240: \\t\\tthis.typescriptServerSpawner = new TypeScriptServerSpawner(this.versionProvider, this._versionManager, this._nodeVersionManager, this.logDirectoryProvider, this.pluginPathsProvider, this.logger, this.telemetryReporter, this.tracer, this.processFactory);\\n241: \\n242: \\t\\tthis._register(this.pluginManager.onDidUpdateConfig(update => {\\n243: \\t\\t\\tthis.configurePlugin(update.pluginId, update.config);\\n244: \\t\\t}));\\n245: \\n246: \\t\\tthis._register(this.pluginManager.onDidChangePlugins(() => {\\n247: \\t\\t\\tthis.restartTsServer();\\n248: \\t\\t}));\\n249: \\t}\\n250: \\n251: \\tpublic get capabilities() {\\n252: \\t\\tif (this._configuration.useSyntaxServer === SyntaxServerConfiguration.Always) {\\n253: \\t\\t\\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\\n254: \\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Syntax,\\n255: \\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax);\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif (isWeb()) {\\n259: \\t\\t\\tif \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax,\\n263: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Semantic);\\n264: \\t\\t\\t} else {\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\\n266: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Syntax,\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax);\\n268: \\t\\t\\t}\\n269: \\t\\t}\\n270: \\n271: \\t\\tif (this.apiVersion.gte(API.v400)) {\\n272: \\t\\t\\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\\n273: \\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Syntax,\\n274: \\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.EnhancedSyntax,\\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Semantic);\\n276: \\t\\t}\\n277: \\n278: \\t\\treturn new ClientCapabilities(\\n279: \\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Syntax,\\n280: \\t\\t\\tClientCapability.Semantic);\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\n283: \\tprivate readonly _onDidChangeCapabilities = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<void>());\\n284: \\treadonly onDidChangeCapabilities = this._onDidChangeCapabilities.event;\\n285: \\n286: \\tprivate isProjectWideIntellisenseOnWebEnabled(): boolean {\\n287: \\t\\treturn isWebAndHasSharedArrayBuffers() && this._configuration.webProjectWideIntellisenseEnabled;\\n288: \\t}\\n289: \\n290: \\tprivate cancelInflightRequestsForResource(resource: vscode.Uri): void {\\n291: \\t\\tif (this.serverState.type !== ServerState.Type.Running) {\\n292: \\t\\t\\treturn;\\n293: \\t\\t}\\n294: \\n295: \\t\\tfor (const request of this.serverState.toCancelOnResourceChange) {\\n296: \\t\\t\\tif (request.resource.toString() === resource.toString()) {\\n297: \\t\\t\\t\\trequest.cancel();\\n298: \\t\\t\\t}\\n299: \\t\\t}\\n300: \\t}\\n301: \\n302: \\tpublic get configuration() {\\n303: \\t\\treturn this._configuration;\\n304: \\t}\\n305: \\n306: \\tpublic override dispose() {\\n307: \\t\\tsuper.dispose();\\n308: \\n309: \\t\\tthis.bufferSyncSupport.dispose();\\n310: \\n311: \\t\\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\\n312: \\t\\t\\tthis.serverState.server.kill();\\n313: \\t\\t}\\n314: \\n315: \\t\\tthis.loadingIndicator.reset();\\n316: \\n317: \\t\\tthis.resetWatchers();\\n318: \\t}\\n319: \\n320: \\tpublic restartTsServer(fromUserAction = false): void {\\n321: \\t\\tif (this.serverState.type === ServerState.Type.Running) {\\n322: \\t\\t\\tthis.info('Killing TS Server');\\n323: \\t\\t\\tthis.isRestarting = true;\\n324: \\t\\t\\tthis.serverState.server.kill();\\n325: \\t\\t}\\n326: \\n327: \\t\\tif (fromUserAction) {\\n328: \\t\\t\\t// Reset crash trackers\\n329: \\t\\t\\tthis.hasServerFatallyCrashedTooManyTimes = false;\\n330: \\t\\t\\tthis.numberRestarts = 0;\\n331: \\t\\t\\tthis.lastStart = Date.now();\\n332: \\t\\t}\\n333: \\n334: \\t\\tthis.serverState = this.startService(true);\\n335: \\t}\\n336: \\n337: \\tprivate readonly _onTsServerStarted = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<{ version: TypeScriptVersion; usedApiVersion: API }>());\\n338: \\tpublic readonly onTsServerStarted = this._onTsServerStarted.event;\\n339: \\n340: \\tprivate readonly _onDiagnosticsReceived = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<TsDiagnostics>());\\n341: \\tpublic readonly onDiagnosticsReceived = this._onDiagnosticsReceived.event;\\n342: \\n343: \\tprivate readonly _onConfigDiagnosticsReceived = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.ConfigFileDiagnosticEvent>());\\n344: \\tpublic readonly onConfigDiagnosticsReceived = this._onConfigDiagnosticsReceived.event;\\n345: \\n346: \\tprivate readonly _onResendModelsRequested = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<void>());\\n347: \\tpublic readonly onResendModelsRequested = this._onResendModelsRequested.event;\\n348: \\n349: \\tprivate readonly _onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.ProjectLanguageServiceStateEventBody>());\\n350: \\tpublic readonly onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged = this._onProjectLanguageServiceStateChanged.event;\\n351: \\n352: \\tprivate readonly _onDidBeginInstallTypings = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.BeginInstallTypesEventBody>());\\n353: \\tpublic readonly onDidBeginInstallTypings = this._onDidBeginInstallTypings.event;\\n354: \\n355: \\tprivate readonly _onDidEndInstallTypings = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.EndInstallTypesEventBody>());\\n356: \\tpublic readonly onDidEndInstallTypings = this._onDidEndInstallTypings.event;\\n357: \\n358: \\tprivate readonly _onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed = this._register(new vscode.EventEmitter<Proto.TypesInstallerInitializationFailedEventBody>());\\n359: \\tpublic readonly onTypesInstallerInitializationFailed =
